sensory_synthesis.interpretation: The system is experiencing multiple anomalies, including battery degradation, current out of range, depth out of range, drift out of range, navigation error out of range, P out of range, T out of range, V out of range, and waypoint out of range. These issues suggest that the system is not functioning as intended and is at risk of failure.

internal_deliberation.thought: The battery is critically low, which is the primary cause of the mission failure. The current, depth, drift, navigation error, P, T, and V values are also out of range, indicating that the system is not operating within its expected parameters.

mission_assurance_check.failure_mode_prediction: The system will likely shut down or fail to operate correctly due to the battery degradation and other out-of-range parameters.
mission_assurance_check.mitigation_strategy: Immediately initiate a battery swap or power management protocol to stabilize the system. If the battery swap is not possible, prepare for an emergency landing or return to base.

decision.expected_outcome: The system should stabilize and continue operating if the battery swap is successful.

agent_reasoning.self_reflection: The system has failed due to critical battery degradation and multiple out-of-range parameters. Immediate action is required to prevent further failure and ensure the safety of the mission.
